# Project Structure

## Navigation

[Home](Home) | [Modules](Modules) | [API](API) | [Examples](Examples) | [Reference Games](Reference-Games) | [Lunasome](Lunasome)

## Table of Contents

- [Files](#files)

A typical game folder is small. The runtime looks for `main.lua`; the rest of the files depend on the game.

```text
my_game/
  conf.lua
  main.lua
  assets/
    player.png
    click.ogg
  data/
    level1.toml
```

## Files

- `main.lua` - defines callbacks and connects game modules.
- `conf.lua` - optionally sets window and runtime options before the game starts.
- `assets/` - media used by render, audio, image, and game code.
- `data/` - TOML or other game data read through the sandbox filesystem.
